elements.text: You just started at a new job and you work with lots of new people. You hear a few of them laughing together and talking about going out to dinner, but they don't invite you along. As you think about your future with this group, you feel...

elements.name: not_invited_to_dinner--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
